name: B/m Cake Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dry ingredients in a large bowl: yeast, salt, and yellow cake mix.
2. In a separate bowl, mix bread flour with melted butter until well combined.
3. Add the wet ingredients (very warm water) to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
4. Pour the remaining batter into the mixing bowl with the bread flour mixture and stir until fully incorporated.
5. Turn off the heat and let the dough rest for about 10 minutes.
6. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it in a greased baking pan.
7. Let the dough rise until doubled in size, then bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 30-40 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Store any leftover mix for use in future loaves.
